title: Crispy Chicken Dumplings
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish that combines the flavors of crispy chicken and tender dumplings.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together flour and a pinch of salt.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk eggs and mix with the dumpling mix.
4. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture and mix until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough for 5 minutes and divide into 8 equal pieces.
6. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
7. Place a chicken breast in the center of each circle and fold the dough over the chicken.
8. Seal the edges and press with a fork to ensure they are sealed.
9. Fry the dumplings for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
